steps.label: LOAD — 20 UCL matches today (max-width stress: live 90+10', two-digit scores, shootouts)
steps.expected: Open the date menu on today: the panel lists 20 UEFA Champions League matches — Real Madrid vs Barcelona live (90+10', 1-1, widest minute column), Liverpool 12-0 Bayern (two-digit home score) and Man City 0-11 Napoli (two-digit away score) to stress the score column, PSV 1 - 1 Celtic with (5 - 4) stacked small under the score and Rangers 1 - 1 Salzburg with (2 - 4) stacked small under the score (penalty shootout tail as a small second line, no extra column width), the rest finished internationals with their scores (blank minute), and Tottenham vs Feyenoord upcoming with its kick-off time. Verify NO horizontal scroll and no away-side gap even at this maximum width. Cold-start suppresses notifications for the already-finished/in-progress matches.

steps.label: HOLD — inspect the panel; press [q]+Enter to finish (Enter just reloads the same day)
steps.expected: The 15 matches stay on screen while you scroll/hover. Pressing q ends the run and removes the test subscription.
